summary: User requested a recap of completed work. Provided Vietnamese summary covering: realtime price/timer sync via AuctionSession polling, AuctionResultBanner for winner/final price on auction end, enhanced user dashboard with active/ended sessions and payment stats, and BiddingService API improvements for getUserBids/getWonItems.
current_status: Auction realtime sync, winner screen, and detailed user dashboard are implemented. Backend compiles. User can restart backend and test two-browser bid flow and dashboard participation history.
